items.label: Topline
items.value: Operating wave is live; routing is stable and repo connectivity is set.

items.label: Repo status
items.value: Connected — GitHub URL is present in company context and available for the next push-capable completion.

items.label: Leadership scan
items.value: Core streams are active, ownership is clear, and there is no open external repo dependency.
